# UPlink Copilot Instructions

These instructions apply to all coding tasks in this repository.

## Agent Behavior

1. After every edit, including small changes, create a git commit and push to the remote repository.
2. Do not apply lazy or superficial fixes. Before implementing a fix, identify the root cause and then address that cause directly.
3. Repository remote URL: https://github.com/ourcaldo/uplink.git

## Git Workflow Requirements

- Keep commits small and focused.
- Use clear commit messages that describe what changed and why.
- Ensure pushes happen after each commit so all progress is tracked remotely.
